projects.title: Greenhouse Gas Emission Prediction
projects.subtitle: Prediction Project
projects.description: This project leverages machine learning to predict greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions driven by supply chain activities, beautifully blending data science with environmental responsibility to support global sustainability effortsA machine learning project

projects.title: Network Port Scanner GUI
projects.description: This project is a Multithreaded Network Port Scanner featuring a vibrant, cyberpunk-themed Graphical User Interface (GUI). It allows users to quickly scan a target IP address or hostname across a customizable range of ports to identify open connections and their associated services.

projects.title: Keystroke Logging Demonstration
projects.description: The Keylogger Control Panel is a lightweight, locally hosted keystroke logging application featuring an interactive Graphical User Interface (GUI).

projects.title: Child Mortality Detection
projects.description: This project is a web-based application built with Django that leverages Machine Learning to predict and analyze child mortality rates. It provides a platform for data management, model training, and visualization to help identify key factors contributing to child mortality.

projects.title: Real Time Live Sports Scoreboard
projects.subtitle: 1 Jul 2024 - 1 Aug 2024
projects.description: A single-page web application that simulates live football scores, match highlights, and league standings — styled with a modern neon sports theme. Built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, this project demonstrates dynamic DOM updates, SPA-style navigation, and mock API simulations.

projects.title: Street Vendor Digitalization
projects.description: Built on IBM watsonx Orchestrate and Granite models, this multi-agent AI empowers street vendors by simplifying PM SVANidhi micro-loans via a RAG pipeline. It offers step-by-step, jargon-free guidance for merchant UPI setup, e-KYC, and map pinning via a zero-friction mobile web chat, actively driving financial inclusion for micro-entrepreneurs.

projects.title: nexus ai assistant
projects.description: Nexus AI Assistant is a modern, multi-LLM-powered web application designed to streamline productivity and creativity. It features a sleek, dark-themed interface offering dedicated modes for accurate question-answering, text summarization, and dynamic content generation.

projects.title: json-formatter-tool
projects.description: json Formatter & Validator is a lightweight, client-side tool to format, minify, and validate JSON instantly. No backend, no installs — just paste and go.
